description: This purse references authentic Indian style with its materials but adds new innovative design details, unique to fabindia's design team. Epitomise the ethnic boho chic look as you match this to Indian ensembles or pair it with a dress and heels for an Indo-Western fusion.Lenth: 15 cmWidth: 24 cmFabric upper with pin-tucksFlap with envelope purse type stylingBrocade detail on the flapConcealed magnetic button closureBeaded strapFabric inner with a separatorCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
